name_cn:
#New Arrival Christmas Edition
Medium Book Tote Handbag
Gold metallic thread embroidery of Dior Jardin d'Hiver pattern (36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm)
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a mainstay piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Embroidered with the Dior Jardin d'Hiver pattern throughout and accented with gold metallic thread for a touch of elegance, this poetic design interprets Monsieur Dior's tapestry. It fits various daily items. The medium size features a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo
Includes dust bag
Style: 8001
